name: Overworld Encounters
author: jov4n
description: Adds Pokemon that roam the overworld as visible encounters.
Features shiny spawns, fusion encounters, horde battles (2v1),
outbreak events with Shiny Panic, and highly configurable settings.

settings.label: Disable Encounters
settings.description: Disable overworld encounters.

settings.label: Log Spawns
settings.description: Log encounter spawns to console.

settings.label: Shiny Rate (1/X)
settings.description: Chance denominator for shiny spawns.

settings.label: Spawn Distance
settings.description: Maximum distance from player before despawn.

settings.label: Despawn Far Events
settings.description: Remove events that are too far away.

settings.label: Bright Shinies
settings.description: Shinies are unaffected by day/night tone.

settings.label: Colorful Names
settings.description: Use gender colors for Pokemon names.

settings.label: Water Spawns (Surf)
settings.description: Only spawn water Pokemon when surfing.

settings.label: Spawn Animation ID
settings.description: Animation ID for spawning Pokemon.

settings.label: Shiny Animation ID
settings.description: Animation ID for shiny Pokemon.

settings.label: Despawn Shinies
settings.description: Allow shiny Pokemon to despawn.

settings.label: Different Encounters
settings.description: Use different encounter tables.

settings.label: Encounter Table ID
settings.description: Encounter table index to use.

settings.label: Max Encounters
settings.description: Maximum Pokemon spawned on each map.

settings.label: Fusion Encounters
settings.description: Enable wild fusion encounters.

settings.label: Fusion Rate (1/X)
settings.description: Chance for encounter to be a fusion.

settings.label: Horde Battles (2v1)
settings.description: Nearby encounters team up against you.

settings.label: Horde Distance
settings.description: Max tiles apart for horde battle.

settings.label: Spawn on Map Load
settings.description: Spawn multiple encounters immediately when entering a map.

settings.label: Initial Spawn Count
settings.description: Number of encounters to spawn when entering a map (if enabled).

settings.label: Outbreak Events
settings.description: Enable random outbreak events on maps.

settings.label: Outbreak Duration
settings.description: How long outbreak events last.

settings.label: Outbreak Variety
settings.description: Pokemon variety during outbreaks.

settings.label: Outbreak Shiny Rate
settings.description: Shiny rate multiplier during outbreaks (1-10x).

settings.label: No Shiny Despawn (Outbreak)
settings.description: Prevent shiny despawn during outbreaks.

settings.label: Outbreak Initial Spawns
settings.description: Pokemon spawned when outbreak starts.

settings.label: Outbreak Max Pokemon
settings.description: Max encounters during an outbreak.

settings.label: Outbreak Spawn Rate
settings.description: Frames between spawns during outbreaks (Lower is faster).

settings.label: Outbreak Radius
settings.description: Radius around the player where outbreak Pokemon appear.

settings.label: Outbreak Shiny Panic
settings.description: 1/8096 chance to turn all spawns Shiny for 1 minute during outbreaks.
